retrieved_result: Android users can now type in Hindi, courtesy the Google Hindi Input app News-Analysis Priyanka Tilve Mar 02, 2013 12:59 PM ISTComment 0Tweet Google recently released a Hindi Input app, which lets Android users type in Hindi. It works like a keyboard extension and once you install the app, you can choose to type in Hindi for just about everything. You can compose text me
